message:
🐛 Require webhook secret and fix origin validation bypass (#2453)

- feedback.go: Reject GitHub webhooks when GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET is not
  configured instead of silently accepting them without verification.
- analytics_proxy.go: Reject requests with neither Origin nor Referer
  header instead of allowing them to bypass the origin allowlist.

Security: M7 (webhook secret required), M8 (origin validation bypass).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
